message:
chore(demo_showcase): sync uncommitted work for bd-15xi, bd-22c0, bd-2qq7

Commits previously completed work that was not pushed:

- logs.rs (bd-15xi): copy/export/clear actions implementation
  - 'y' copies current line to file
  - 'Y' copies all filtered logs to file
  - 'e' exports full buffer
  - 'X' clears log buffer with notification
  - Tests for all action functions

- files.rs (bd-22c0): markdown preview via glamour
  - Detect markdown by extension
  - Render via glamour with current theme
  - Support syntax highlighting toggle
  - RwLock for thread-safe interior mutability

- wizard.rs (bd-2qq7): additional deployment tests
  - Tests for start_deployment returns cmd
  - Tests for tick_deployment returns cmds
  - Tests for deployment_config captures state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
